items.headline: DeepSeek V4 Preview (Apr 24)
items.diff_narrative: **New: DeepSeek V4 Preview (Apr 24)** — Last report had Qwen3.6-27B at the center of local / open-weight conversation. Now **DeepSeek-V4-Pro / V4-Flash** ship — 1.6T / 284B MoE + native 1M context + Hugging Face open weights, with self-rated "3-6 months" gap to GPT-5.4 / Gemini 3.1-Pro. The shape of the open-weight frontier extends from Alibaba alone to the Chinese AI lab cohort.

items.headline: OpenAI GPT-5.5 / GPT-5.5 Pro (Apr 23)
items.diff_narrative: **New: OpenAI GPT-5.5 / GPT-5.5 Pro (Apr 23)** — Last report focused on OpenAI Workspace Agents (Codex-driven, Business / Enterprise). Now we have **GPT-5.5 itself**, rolled out on ChatGPT / Codex with SWE-bench 88.7% / hallucinations -60% — a real "model-base generation step." API price doubles, with "smarter" front and center.

items.headline: Intel Q1 2026 earnings beat, +20% (Apr 23)
items.diff_narrative: **New: Intel Q1 2026 earnings beat, +20% (Apr 23)** — Last report had only the pre-print "after-close Apr 23, est EPS $0.01 / revenue $12.39B." Now actual **EPS $0.29 / revenue $13.58B** beats both lines big, Data Center +22% YoY, AI-related at 60% of revenue, 18A ramp confirmed. Stock +20% AH, six straight quarters of guidance beats.

items.headline: Anthropic Claude Code quality post-mortem (Apr 23-24)
items.diff_narrative: **New: Anthropic Claude Code quality post-mortem (Apr 23-24)** — Last report focused on the Mythos Preview unauthorized-access incident. Now we have **a formal technical post-mortem on the "Claude Code is degrading" reports through March**, attributing causes to three changes (reasoning-effort default / idle-thinking-clear bug / verbosity-reduction prompt). All reverted, v2.1.116 fix, usage caps reset as compensation.

items.headline: OpenClaw v2026.4.22 (Apr 23)
items.diff_narrative: **New: OpenClaw v2026.4.22 (Apr 23)** — Last report had the v2026.4.21 stable. Now **v2026.4.22** adds image gen / TTS / STT to the xAI provider (grok-imagine-image / grok-imagine-image-pro / 6 voices / MP3 / WAV / PCM / G.711 / grok-stt / live voice-call transcription), fixes Moonshot Kimi K2.6's multi-turn tool_call ID handling, isolates Gateway/Linux child-process oom_score_adj, updates pi model 0.68.1 (Kimi K2.6 / Qwen / GLM / MiMo / MiniMax aliases), and bundles the tokenjuice plugin — a major feature expansion.

items.headline: Ollama v0.21.2 (Apr 24)
items.diff_narrative: **New: Ollama v0.21.2 (Apr 24)** — Last report had v0.21.1 stable. Now **v0.21.2** integrates OpenClaw / web-search plugins as bundled, with macOS / Linux / Windows binaries.

items.headline: llama.cpp Apr 23-24 release
items.diff_narrative: **New: llama.cpp Apr 23-24 release** — Last report ended with WebGPU async tensor API / event API builds. Now we have an **Apr 24 03:00 UTC official release** (CLI verbose-sampling-variable removal / issue #20429) plus llama-cpp-binaries v0.123.0 (Apr 23, full set including CUDA).

items.headline: Siemens × Humanoid HMND 01 Alpha 8h production run at Erlangen (Apr 23)
items.diff_narrative: **New: Siemens × Humanoid HMND 01 Alpha 8h production run at Erlangen (Apr 23)** — Last report covered Hannover Messe 2026's Agile Robots / Accenture+Vodafone+SAP pilot. Now **Siemens's production electronics factory** records HMND 01 Alpha at **60 tote/h × 8h × 90%+ success** under integrated NVIDIA Physical AI + KinetIQ + Xcelerator — a qualitative jump from "PoC" to "production."

items.headline: Tesla Q1 2026 earnings finalized + Optimus V3 mass-production confirmed (Apr 22-23)
items.diff_narrative: **New: Tesla Q1 2026 earnings finalized + Optimus V3 mass-production confirmed (Apr 22-23)** — Last report had Musk's "Model S/X line repurposed, July-August mass production, initial speed very slow." Now **revenue $22.4B (+16% YoY) / EPS $0.41 beat**, official 2026 capex guide >$25B, Fremont line preparing 1M Optimus V3 / year + Giga Texas's 10M-scale second factory plan confirmed in IR materials.

items.headline: ServiceNow -18% post-print, worst-ever single-day drop (Apr 23)
items.diff_narrative: **New: ServiceNow -18% post-print, worst-ever single-day drop (Apr 23)** — Last report had the print-day -12 to -14% (Apr 22). Now Apr 23 expands to **-18%, YTD 2026 -45%**. The "AI displaces existing workflow SaaS" concern ripples through the sector — Salesforce / Workday / Oracle / IBM all chained-fall — and "AI disruption on legacy SaaS" becomes its own theme.

items.headline: Tencent Hunyuan Hy3 Preview open-sourced (Apr 23)
items.diff_narrative: **New: Tencent Hunyuan Hy3 Preview open-sourced (Apr 23)** — Not in the previous report. **Tencent open-sources Hunyuan Hy3 Preview**. Tencent joins Alibaba and DeepSeek in the Chinese AI labs' open-weight frontier race.

items.headline: 0G × Alibaba Qwen partnership (Apr 23)
items.diff_narrative: **New: 0G × Alibaba Qwen partnership (Apr 23)** — Last report had Qwen3.6-27B local execution examples. Now **0G Foundation and Alibaba Cloud announce a partnership** introducing a new layer where AI agents can call Qwen models on-chain on a per-token basis. A tectonic shift from API-based to programmable / tokenized AI infrastructure.

items.headline: AWS Bedrock AgentCore Managed Harness detail (Apr 23)
items.diff_narrative: **New: AWS Bedrock AgentCore Managed Harness detail (Apr 23)** — Last report had the new feature batch's overview. Now we have **preview region confirmation** (US West Oregon / US East N. Virginia / Asia Pacific Sydney / Europe Frankfurt), spec of "3 API calls and you're running," filesystem persistence for pause / resume, and AgentCore CLI in all commercial regions.

items.headline: Many 9.8+ CVEs (disclosed Apr 23)
items.diff_narrative: **New: Many 9.8+ CVEs (disclosed Apr 23)** — Adding to the Apr 22 batch (Xerte / Esri / Nimiq / Jellystat / OAuth2 Proxy / EspoCRM and others), this window adds **CVE-2026-31177 (ToToLink A3300R unauth RCE, 9.8)**, **CVE-2026-39087 (Ntfy parseActions RCE, 9.8)**, **CVE-2026-23751 (Kofax Capture unauth R/W + SMB coercion, 9.8)**, **CVE-2026-40472 (hackage-server stored XSS, 9.9)**.

items.headline: CISA KEV adds CVE-2026-39987 Marimo Pre-Auth RCE (Apr 23)
items.diff_narrative: **New: CISA KEV adds CVE-2026-39987 Marimo Pre-Auth RCE (Apr 23)** — Last report had Apr 22's Defender CVE-2026-33825. Now **Marimo unauth RCE** is added as "actively exploited"; federal deadline May 7.

items.headline: Anthropic Project Glasswing publicity continues (through April)
items.diff_narrative: **New: Anthropic Project Glasswing publicity continues (through April)** — Last report focused on the Mythos Preview unauthorized-access incident. Now **Glasswing (auto-discovery of vulns in critical software using Mythos Preview)** has **40+ orgs onboard** including Microsoft / Google / Apple / AWS / NVIDIA / JPMorgan Chase / Linux Foundation, with Anthropic's $100M credit + $4M open-source donation commitment back in focus.

items.headline: Agentic AI Security solution-provider axis (added in this report)
items.diff_narrative: **New: Agentic AI Security solution-provider axis (added in this report)** — Prior reports treated AI Security primarily through "incidents" and "CVEs." This window makes **Zero-trust access control for agentic AI** and **Monitor and manage AI agent behavior** the two explicit axes of solution-provider attention. Notably **Keycard (out of stealth Oct 2025 with $38M, a16z / boldstart / Acrew, founders from Snyk + Auth0 + Passport.js, Anchor.dev / Runebook acquisitions, Smallstep partnership)**, **Okta for AI Agents (GA 2026-04-30)**, **Exabeam Agent Behavior Analytics extended to the Google Cloud Agent ecosystem on Apr 22 + 2026 Google Cloud Partner of the Year**, **Zenity (named in 2 categories of Gartner Hype Cycle for Agentic AI 2026 + Fortune Cyber 60)**. Cisco / Microsoft / Wiz (under Google Cloud) / CrowdStrike / Palo Alto / Arize / Braintrust / Galileo / Fiddler / Levo.ai / LangSmith are confirmed ecosystem players.
